rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §30.0021 governs special education services for visually impaired students and a supplemental allowance from the foundation school fund. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13.
quote: To facilitate implementation of this section, the commissioner shall develop a system to distribute from the foundation school fund to school districts or regional education service centers a special supplemental allowance for each student with a visual impairment.
_note: Proposed homestead exemption increase may indirectly affect local school district property tax revenue, but this section draws supplemental funding from the foundation school fund and contains no direct dependency on homestead exemption amounts.
